title: helichrysum riparium
intro: Helichrysum riparium, a flowering plant species, is also known as the riveric helichrysum or yellow cough weed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum riparium include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
